nasb.text: ‘But if he brings a lamb as his offering for a sin offering, he shall bring it, a female without defect.

esv.text: “If he brings a lamb as his offering for a sin offering, he shall bring a female without blemish

cnv.text: “如果人獻一隻綿羊羔作贖罪祭的供物，就要牽一隻沒有殘疾的母羊；

ccb.text: “他若献绵羊作赎罪祭，必须献一只毫无残疾的母绵羊。
